title: phpMyAdmin max_execution_time: Fix Import Timeouts
description: When PHP hits max_execution_time, imports stop. Use this workaround without server access.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: max_execution_time kills long‑running imports in phpMyAdmin. The fastest fix is smaller chunks.

items: Split your SQL file into smaller parts

content.text: See also: **How to Fix phpMyAdmin Import Timeout Errors**.

content.title: Beat phpMyAdmin timeouts
content.text: Split your dump into smaller, reliable imports.

faq.question: Can I change max_execution_time?
faq.answer: Only if you control server settings. Otherwise splitting is the best option.
